overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny urban Los Santos neighborhood. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets with light traffic, and passes by a Taco Bomb restaurant and various commercial and residential buildings.

events.description: walking from open plaza toward street intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through urban plaza toward a street intersection with a Taco Bomb restaurant visible ahead

entered.detail: two-story red brick commercial building with white trim and multiple windows
open paved pedestrian area with shadows from surrounding structures
fast food restaurant with purple and yellow signage and outdoor seating area
tall palm trees visible above buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character begins in an open urban plaza with a brick building on the left. Walking forward toward a commercial intersection, the Taco Bomb restaurant becomes visible in the distance along with palm trees lining the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing approaching fast food restaurant

events.description: gray SUV drives past from left to right as character crosses the street
steps onto sidewalk and approaches the Taco Bomb restaurant entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt road while a vehicle passes by, then stepping onto the sidewalk near the restaurant patio

notable_agents.action: gray SUV driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: modern gray sport utility vehicle driving across the intersection
fenced outdoor dining area with blue umbrellas and tables
gray concrete sidewalk with red painted curb

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street as a gray SUV passes by, then approaches the Taco Bomb restaurant. The outdoor patio with blue umbrellas becomes prominent on the left as the character steps onto the sidewalk.

events.description: passing an NPC with a shopping cart near a tree planter

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the restaurant and continuing down the street, passing pedestrians and a street vendor

notable_agents.action: homeless NPC standing next to a shopping cart and cardboard boxes

entered.detail: multi-story white residential building with red roof trim and balconies
wooden telephone pole with transformer and street light

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the character passes the Taco Bomb restaurant and encounters an NPC with a shopping cart. The white apartment building becomes visible across the street while utility poles line the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with modern apartments

events.description: turns left at street corner, passing modern apartment buildings
crosses another street intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and walking along a new street with modern residential architecture, then crossing the road

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: contemporary multi-story apartment complex with dark facade and red accents
low white brick wall bordering the sidewalk
large green industrial dumpster on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the corner into a residential area with modern apartment buildings. After passing a pedestrian in a yellow shirt, the character crosses another street intersection where a green dumpster sits on the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with construction barrier and palm tree lining

events.description: white sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a bright blue construction fence, approaching a more commercial area with palm trees

entered.detail: bright blue temporary construction barrier running along the entire left side of the sidewalk
two-story houses and small apartment buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a sidewalk bordered by a vivid blue construction fence on the left. Palm trees line the street ahead, and a white sports car passes by on the road as the character continues toward a more densely vegetated area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny urban neighborhood that transitions from a commercial plaza into a modern residential district. It begins in an open plaza beside a brick building, moving forward toward a commercial intersection where palm trees and a Taco Bomb restaurant appear in the distance. As the character crosses the street past a gray SUV, the scene shifts toward the restaurant's outdoor patio with its blue umbrellas before continuing along a sidewalk lined with utility poles and a white apartment building. The camera then turns left at the corner, moving past a pedestrian in a yellow shirt and across another intersection marked by a green dumpster. Finally, the path follows a vivid blue construction fence as a white sports car passes by, leading the character toward a more densely vegetated area.
